title: Protest Over Salary Hike Turns Violent In Noida; Workers Torch Cars, Hurl Stones; Cops Fire Tear Gas To Control Crowd
description: Employees of a private company had been staging a sit-in for the past three days, seeking salary hike and overtime compensation among other demands, in Phase 2 of Noida. The protest intensified on Monday as agitated groups took to the streets, hurling stones, vandalising property and setting vehicles on fire.
